title: Tendor Virus
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Tendor Virus''' was a deadly virus that threatened to wipe out the entire [[Caldoni system/Legends|Caldoni system]], until [[Jenna Zan Arbor]] discovered a cure more than twelve years before the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Evil Experiment]]'' {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
